info.name: EWM — Unified Postman Collection (main + subscriptions + stats + extras)
info.description:
Unified, ordered collection built from multiple EWM Postman collections: main-service API tests, subscriptions feature, stats-service tests, plus standalone users/categories and a bug reproduction set.

Variables:
- baseUrlMain: main-service host (default http://localhost:8080)
- baseUrlStats: stats-service host (default http://localhost:9090)

Note: original {{baseUrl}} usages were rewritten to {{baseUrlMain}} for main-related suites and {{baseUrlStats}} for stats suite to avoid clashes.

item.description: Repro for /events search filters mismatch: create category+user, create 2 events (paid/free) with same category and unique text marker, publish them, then search with paid=true/false/absent and assert exact results.
